briefing: Tesla launches its robotaxi service in Dallas and Houston, expanding its autonomous vehicle offerings.

articles.title: Tesla brings its robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston
articles.snippet: Tesla is expanding its robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston, according to a social media post from the company. The post says simply that “Robotaxi is now rolling out in Dallas & Houston 🤠” and includes a 14-second video showing Tesla vehicles driving without human monitors or drivers in the front seat. The company now […]
articles.ai_summary: Tesla has launched its robotaxi service in Dallas and Houston, showcasing vehicles operating without human drivers. This expansion marks a significant step in Tesla's autonomous vehicle strategy.
articles.why_it_matters: Demonstrates Tesla's commitment to advancing autonomous transportation.

articles.title: The RAM shortage could last years
articles.snippet: According to Nikkei Asia, even as suppliers ramp up DRAM production, manufacturers are only expected to meet 60 percent of demand by the end of 2027. SK Group chairman has even said that shortages could last until 2030. The world's largest memory makers - Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron - are all working to add […]
articles.ai_summary: A report indicates that the global RAM shortage may persist until 2030, with manufacturers only expected to meet 60% of demand by 2027. Major memory makers are ramping up production but face ongoing challenges.
articles.why_it_matters: Highlights ongoing supply chain issues affecting the tech industry.
